ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., SG, PG) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university the player attended */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the player's current contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score_home" TEXT /* Final score of the home team */,
  "score_away" TEXT /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee(s) for the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in that game */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored by the player in that game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the fantasy team */,
  "current_salary" REAL /* Current salary spent by the fantasy team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the fantasy team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the fantasy team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties for the fantasy team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the fantasy team in the league */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the team's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup entry */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the lineup is submitted */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player included in the lineup */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the fantasy lineup (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "bench_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player is in the starting lineup or on the bench */,
  "points_contributed" REAL /* Points contributed by the player in the fantasy lineup for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_lineups_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_lineups_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., commissioner, participant) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_settings" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy league */,
  "max_teams" INTEGER /* Maximum number of teams allowed in the league */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date of the draft */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "draft_type" TEXT /* Type of draft (e.g., snake, auction) */,
  "roster_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in a fantasy team */,
  "salary_cap" REAL /* Salary cap for the league */,
  "fantasy_points_settings" TEXT /* Settings for calculating fantasy points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team making the pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being picked */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in that round */,
  "draft_order" INTEGER /* Overall draft order of the pick */,
  "pick_status" TEXT /* Status of the pick (e.g., available, picked) */,
  "pick_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the pick was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES league_settings ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "fantasy_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fantasy team */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the score is calculated */,
  "total_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored by the team in that game */,
  "date_calculated" TEXT /* Date when the score was calculated */,
  "winning_margin" REAL /* Margin by which the fantasy team won or lost the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing fantasy team */,
  "opponent_score" REAL /* Score of the opposing fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_scores_fantasy_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("fantasy_team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
